description:
Sundry is a WinGet local manifest management tool that makes it easier for you to remove manifests, make changes to them, and also aids in updating them.


Optimization 
- pref: Optimize manual validation logic and input handling by @DuckDuckStudio 
Miscellaneous 
- chore: Remove winget-tools additional check switch by @DuckDuckStudio
Full Changelog: https://github.com/DuckDuckStudio/Sundry/compare/1.1.7...1.1.8
